heading: Monday (Memorial Day)
text: Widespread moderate rain showers most likely in the morning, then drying west to east by noon.  Highs from the mid 60s to low 70s north, in the low to mid 70s south. Calm to light west winds.

heading: Monday Night
text: Clouds breaking before sunset becoming partly clear with lingering clouds along the western slopes of the Greens and high clouds over southern portions. Lows from the upper 40s to low 50s, mid 50s in the warmer valleys.

heading: Tuesday
text: Partly cloudy in the morning, becoming mostly sunny in the afternoon. Highs from the mid to upper 70s north, from the low to mid 80s south.
